title: Slow soliton interaction with delta impurities
summary:
We study the Gross-Pitaevskii equation with a delta function potential, $ q
\delta_0 $, where $|q|$ is small, and analyze the solutions for which the
initial condition is a soliton with initial velocity $v_0$. We show that up to
time $ (|q| + v_0^2)^{-\frac12} \log(1/|q|) $ the bulk of the solution is a
soliton evolving according to the classical dynamics of a natural effective
Hamiltonian, $ (\xi^2 + q \sech^2 (x))/2 $.
